plugins.name: data-forge
plugins.description: End-to-end data-issue resolution for ETL codebases: Jira intake, diagnosis, code fix, PRF validation, BPP pipeline execution, post-deploy verification.

plugins.name: auditpath
plugins.description: End-to-end SOX pipeline onboarding: JIRA intake, source analysis, DM + DQ conf generation, BPP registration, unit testing, SOX completeness/accuracy validation, and JIRA close-out. Domain-agnostic — works for QBC, Loss Reserve, Capital, or any future domain.

plugins.name: pii-minimization
plugins.description: End-to-end IDPS encryption rollout: Phase 1 decrypt-on-read and Phase 2 encrypt-on-write across RDA BPP, QuickETL, SPP, Report Requestor, and Quickbase pipelines. Includes Redshift column widening gate before Phase 2.
